---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(vegan)
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(DESeq2)
library(reshape2)
library(emmeans)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
```


```{r}
ps1 = readRDS("/Preprocessing/ps1_AlphaDiv_02182026.RDS")


ps1.clean <- prune_samples(sample_sums(ps1) > 8000, ps1)
ps1.clean <- subset_samples(ps1.clean, Soil_type.x != "Sterile")

```


```{r}
singleton_counts <- taxa_sums(ps1.clean) == 1
table(singleton_counts)
# TRUE = singletons, FALSE = non-singletons
```
We have 8051 ASVs that are singletons vs 13 that are not. 


**Function to calculate Alpha Diversity:**
```{r}
alpha_div <- estimate_richness(ps1.clean, measures = c("Observed", "Chao1", "Shannon", "Simpson"))
head(alpha_div)
```


```{r}

# 4. Merge with sample metadata (optional)
alpha_div$SampleID <- rownames(alpha_div)
alpha_div <- merge(alpha_div, data.frame(sample_data(ps1.clean)), by.x = "SampleID", by.y = "row.names")



```


```{r}
# 6. Plot for Shannon, Chao, and observed richness

ps1.clean_i1 = subset_samples(ps1.clean, Iteration == 1)
comparisons <- list(
  c("A", "C"),
  c("A", "M"),
  c("C", "M")
)


Plot_i1 = plot_richness(ps1.clean_i1, measures = c("Observed", "Chao1", "Shannon"), x = "Clade") +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Clade),
    width = 0.6,
    alpha = 0.75,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    size = 2.2,
    alpha = 0.85,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~variable,
    scales = "free_y",
    labeller = labeller(variable = c(
      Observed = "Observed ASVs",
      Chao1    = "Chao1 Richness",
      Shannon  = "Shannon Diversity"
    ))
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    A = "Andigenum",
    C = "Chiletanum",
    M = "N. American"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Alpha Diversity",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  ) + 
    stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = comparisons,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    p.adjust.method = "BH",
    label = "p.signif",
    step.increase = 0.08
  )

Plot_i1
```


```{r}
library(ggpubr)

ps1.clean_i5 = subset_samples(ps1.clean, Iteration == 5)
Plot_i5 = plot_richness(ps1.clean_i5, measures = c("Observed", "Chao1", "Shannon"), x = "Clade") +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(fill = Clade),
    width = 0.6,
    alpha = 0.75,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_jitter(
    width = 0.15,
    size = 2.2,
    alpha = 0.85,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~variable,
    scales = "free_y",
    labeller = labeller(variable = c(
      Observed = "Observed ASVs",
      Chao1    = "Chao1 Richness",
      Shannon  = "Shannon Diversity"
    ))
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    A = "Andigenum",
    C = "Chiletanum",
    M = "N. American"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Alpha Diversity",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  ) + 
    stat_compare_means(
    comparisons = comparisons,
    method = "wilcox.test",
    p.adjust.method = "BH",
    label = "p.signif",
    step.increase = 0.08
  )


Plot_i5
```


```{r}
library(cowplot)

combined_plot <- plot_grid(Plot_i1, Plot_i5, labels = c("A", "B"), nrow = 2)
combined_plot

#ggsave("Figure_2.pdf", combined_plot, width = 12, height = 10) #At ASV level. 
```
